response:
Subject: Appeal to Unblock Account – Suspicious Payments

Dear Google Support,

I am writing to appeal the recent account block due to suspicious payments. I did not make any payments that triggered the block. The activity appears to be unrelated to my account usage. I would like to request the unblocking of my account to continue using Google services. I am willing to provide additional information if needed. Thank you for your assistance.

Sincerely,  
[Your Name]
